problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: If Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene is applied to it, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
